# ChainStream

> AI-native on-chain big data infrastructure providing real-time trading data,
> token analytics, wallet profiling, and quantitative trading capabilities
> across BSC, Base, Solana, and 10+ blockchains.

## Core Capabilities
- [API Reference](https://docs.chainstream.io/api-reference): REST, WebSocket, Kafka streaming APIs with <100ms latency
- [MCP Server](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/ai-infrastructure/mcp-server/introduction): Model Context Protocol server (17 tools) for AI agent integration
- [Agent Skills](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/ai-infrastructure/agent-skills/introduction): Structured AI capability packages for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex
- [CLI](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/cli/overview): Command-line tool for data queries and DeFi execution with built-in wallet
- [A2UI Components](https://docs.chainstream.io/a2ui): Interactive crypto dashboard components (K-line, PnL, holders)
- [Quantitative Trading](https://docs.chainstream.io/quant): Strategy generation, backtesting, and DEX execution

## Supported Chains
- [Chain Coverage](https://docs.chainstream.io/chains): Solana, BSC, Base, Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, and more

## Pricing
- [Pricing](https://chainstream.io/pricing): API Key subscriptions and x402 micropayment (pay-per-query, no registration)
- [x402 Payment](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/cli/x402-payment): Auto-purchase subscriptions with USDC via x402 or MPP

## Getting Started
- [Quick Start](https://docs.chainstream.io/quickstart): Connect in under 5 minutes
- [MCP Setup](https://docs.chainstream.io/mcp/setup): One-line Claude/Cursor integration
- [CLI Setup](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/cli/overview): `npx @chainstream-io/cli login` to start
- [Skills Installation](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/ai-infrastructure/agent-skills/installation): Install skills for your AI coding assistant
